category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Georgia market (GeoSTM national standards, GOST-based and progressively EU-approximated). Georgia is NOT an EAEU member — TR CU 019/2011 does not apply.

title.en: China-to-Georgia PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入格鲁吉亚（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入格魯吉亞（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Georgia requirements under GeoSTM national standards (GOST-based, e.g. GOST 12.4.x series and adopted EN 149), national conformity certification, Georgian-language labelling, and market surveillance by the Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology (GeoSTM). Georgia has an EU Association Agreement (DCFTA) with gradual EU-technical approximation in progress; full EU regulatory adoption is not yet in force. Ports: Poti and Batumi (Black Sea).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与格鲁吉亚要求对照，涵盖GeoSTM国家标准（基于GOST，如GOST 12.4.x系列及已采用的EN 149）、国家合格认证、格鲁吉亚语标签，以及格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局（GeoSTM）市场监督。格鲁吉亚与欧盟签有联系国协议（DCFTA），技术接轨正在渐进推进；欧盟法规体系尚未全面实施。入境港口：波季港和巴统港（黑海）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與格魯吉亞要求對照，涵蓋GeoSTM國家標準（基於GOST，如GOST 12.4.x系列及已採用的EN 149）、國家合格認證、格魯吉亞語標籤，以及格魯吉亞國家標準與計量局（GeoSTM）市場監督。格魯吉亞與歐盟簽有聯繫國協議（DCFTA），技術接軌正在漸進推進；歐盟法規體系尚未全面實施。入境港口：波季港和巴統港（黑海）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Georgia is not an EAEU member and does not apply TR CU 019/2011; its PPE regulatory framework is GeoSTM-based with ongoing EU-technical approximation under the EU-Georgia Association Agreement / DCFTA. Requirements may change as approximation progresses. Exporters and importers should verify current Georgian law, applicable GeoSTM standards, and market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。格鲁吉亚非欧亚经济联盟成员，不适用TR CU 019/2011；其PPE监管框架以GeoSTM为基础，并在欧格联系协议/DCFTA框架下持续向欧盟技术标准靠拢，相关要求可能随接轨进程变化。出口商及进口商在出货前应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行格鲁吉亚法律、适用GeoSTM标准及市场监督实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。格魯吉亞非歐亞經濟聯盟成員，不適用TR CU 019/2011；其PPE監管框架以GeoSTM為基礎，並在歐格聯繫協議/DCFTA框架下持續向歐盟技術標準靠攏，相關要求可能隨接軌進程變化。出口商及進口商在出貨前應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行格魯吉亞法律、適用GeoSTM標準及市場監督實踐。

answer_first.en: Georgia is NOT an EAEU member — TR CU 019/2011 does NOT apply. Respiratory PPE (FFP masks/respirators) exported from China to Georgia must comply with GeoSTM national standards (GOST-based, e.g. GOST 12.4.x and adopted EN 149) and require national conformity certification administered by the Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology (GeoSTM). Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not automatically satisfy Georgian GeoSTM requirements; re-testing to the applicable Georgian/adopted standard is typically required. There is no horizontal RoHS regime in force in Georgia — this topic does not apply to respiratory PPE here. Labelling must include Georgian-language content. Market surveillance is still maturing. Entry via Poti or Batumi (Black Sea).
answer_first.zh: 格鲁吉亚非欧亚经济联盟成员——TR CU 019/2011不适用。从中国出口至格鲁吉亚的呼吸防护PPE（FFP口罩/呼吸器）须符合GeoSTM国家标准（基于GOST，如GOST 12.4.x及已采用的EN 149），并须通过格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局（GeoSTM）取得国家合格认证。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不自动满足格鲁吉亚GeoSTM要求，通常须按适用的格鲁吉亚/已采用标准重新检测。格鲁吉亚目前尚无生效的横向RoHS制度——该议题不适用于当地的呼吸防护PPE。标签须包含格鲁吉亚语内容。市场监督体系仍在发展完善中。货物经波季港或巴统港（黑海）入境。
answer_first.zht: 格魯吉亞非歐亞經濟聯盟成員——TR CU 019/2011不適用。從中國出口至格魯吉亞的呼吸防護PPE（FFP口罩/呼吸器）須符合GeoSTM國家標準（基於GOST，如GOST 12.4.x及已採用的EN 149），並須通過格魯吉亞國家標準與計量局（GeoSTM）取得國家合格認證。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不自動滿足格魯吉亞GeoSTM要求，通常須按適用的格魯吉亞/已採用標準重新檢測。格魯吉亞目前尚無生效的橫向RoHS制度——該議題不適用於當地的呼吸防護PPE。標籤須包含格魯吉亞語內容。市場監督體系仍在發展完善中。貨物經波季港或巴統港（黑海）入境。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or on GeoSTM standard revision
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
